title: External Agent Write API — Condition Assessment Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='condition_assessment'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='condition', source slug 'agent-submission'. Use when the agent is producing a single rollup judgment of vehicle condition (e.g. for valuation, listing prep, insurance). Different from 'inspection' — the inspection is the act, the condition_assessment is the verdict.

summary.description: 1–2 sentence headline of the assessment (e.g. 'Solid driver-quality K5 — body straight, drivetrain tired, interior aged honestly').

narrative.description: Free-form long-form rationale supporting the rollup.

overall_condition.description: Single-word rollup. Maps to common collector-car grade language.

condition_score.description: Optional Hagerty-style numerical rating, 1–4 (1=concours, 4=fair). Use only if the assessor is comfortable on that scale.

scoring_basis.description: What the assessor based the rollup on. Drives trust weighting downstream.

value_estimate_usd.description: Optional estimated market value supporting the assessment. USD.

comp_basis.description: Free-form note on how value was anchored (e.g. 'BaT comps for 1986 K5 SWBs sold 2024-2025').

photos_referenced.description: Caller-side identifiers of photos this assessment leans on.
